messages: Memory access fault by GPU node-2: Reason: Unknown

read: Unguarded S512 sparse-LI still faults when single-rank FSDP is skipped and the LightningIndexer auxiliary loss is disabled. This narrows the current crash to the materialized sparse attention backward path itself rather than FSDP post-backward handling, multi-rank EP, activation checkpointing, or LI aux-loss gradients. The temporary selected-state guard is still required until the sparse MLA path stops materializing selected K/V state or uses a fused backward-safe kernel.
